tables.html:
Key differentiators: post-procedureOrders-based image managementEncounters-based image management
EHR content searchabilityStandard metadata, determined by order nameMay be included in clinical note or only generically described
Image archive instantiated ordersNot requiredMay only include generic description of imaging performed i.e. Derm Photo
ADT to ORM transformationNot requiredGeneric description and may result in multiple instances of same order in archive
Prior image relevancyMetadata provides viewer points to define prior image relevanceCannot be ascertained with generic image description
